content:
1. Check Cheri's guide, ask around in <#1326453691527594035> and check leaderboards for d-zone and arcade to see what people run in a particular rotation.

2. Again, check Cheri's guide, it gives a brief overview on how useful each awakener is, how much you need to invest in them and what awakeners make for good teammates. In case of doubt, ask on a case by case basis.

3. The only awakener that I see people avoid is Uvhash, and even he could work with the right team and investment. Think less on what to avoid and more on what you want to invest in and how much.

Please be sure to check out our <#1304022827824844842>  section! Here are a few resources, tips, and walkthroughs to help you master the game:
## General Guide
- [Morimens New Players Handbook](<https://docs.google.com/document/d/1THjxR9hHs4NWHqSWHHa2dHAGuE_cRGelfzXdBfCnIlM/edit?usp=sharing>) by Cheri
- [Game Mechanics](https://discord.com/channels/1131791637933199470/1511362816362283118) by Mythag University
- [Store Guide](https://discordapp.com/channels/1131791637933199470/1442292634575175710) by Mythag University 
- [Morimens Database and Teambuiler](https://skeydb.com/#/database) by Fjant
## Mode Specific
- [P-Dive Shortest Map Analysis](<https://discord.com/channels/1131791637933199470/1483756178340315216>) by Aurora
## Compendium
- [Morimens Compendium](<https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1TCU7LJRzqKeuvLe97y_TfGZ-j6jq5bZX6hskAAJ2mFQ/edit?gid=167686509#gid=167686509>) by Mythag University
- [Boss Compendium](https://discord.com/channels/1131791637933199470/1489244885025292328) by Mythag University
Alr, thanks alot! <:Saya_wow:1513124172895879198>

Considering that you have an account similarly developed to mine (and probably the majority of people helping week 1 or 2 players here), I think you'll fare better by asking in <#1400749543288475770> . Nonetheless, you clearly have the tools to make a GHelot, a Lemurian, a Vortice, a Saya+exalt dps team and/or a Castor team, for example. Also, remember that you should always have an a5 clear with an awakener borrowed from a whale (like Mouchette).
okay will give aigis a try and see how that goes, thanks!

went to swap helot with aigis instead, needed the corrosion burst from saya to help with clearing the mobs. Although still needed to use E.Gnosis to clear the final boss :/

But got much further this time to the final health bar of boss  before dying with the previous team. (died before depleting any health bar)
btw u don't really need death resist for mouchette at e0 so replace that ssr with analysis of death which will also help u clear mobs
also consider getting saya to e1 for extra corrosion if you want

It depends how much money you got. You are NOT doin' nothin' with over 70% of ultra's without their E3s, and their scaling just isn't the best. Of course this applies to many other units from other realms aswell, but if we take only standard pulls into account, then you're gonna get fucked twofold tryna do magic with ultra. Using other realms standards with E0 you're only gonna get it from behind, least your mouth is free. Use and pull for anything other than ultra as a new player. There's a reason why you were recommended a team without ultra, and that's cause it's hot buns...FOR f2p. There's many good ultra's, like the spider and cast, but you ain't gettin' them for a while. And you also ain't gettin' to endgame for a while (in a year +- 2 months, f2p, and the endgame is miles apart from a whale's). BUT, the realm effect of ultra can indeed be said to be the strongest, but the divine realms of ultra ain't that good (USpace). Though if you want ultra, you may try to use some maginks with the mouse girl and the therapist whom are on the banner rn, since she's pretty good and jenkins is also a solid ultra dps. Also for ultra you actually need a plan on how to use your cards. Every other realm is  braindead to use in the sense that you don't need that optimal teams to make 'em work. Also if you want the devs to buff ultra, then you can go recommending the realm to others, lol. Though, of course do whatever you want. Use commonsense, if you like ultra then you use ultra, why should you use other realms if you don't like their gameplay. Though you may be in luck, because as said, clem is on the banner and saya is on the banner (saya's WoD is op, if you want to play ultra like cast in the future then at the very least pull for her wheel).  You have a couple of days to make it to complete ch4, and you'll unlock saya + 250 pulls for free. Anything works for arc 1, just use commonsense and don't pull for standard ultra
Also saya's wheel gives +1 aritmetica, so even more reason to get it
You have some good chars, like naut, karen and thais. From there it's free land. Make use of current banners and pick a character to build your team around and you'll be fine
Thais is a great caro support, so that's why it is many times recommended to be paired up with aigis whom you'll unlock for free
Oh and you got horla, who's also a very good support
More reason for you to make an ultra team, since that's what you like
Just make some team and clear upto ch4, so you'll get all of the free pulls
You have until monday to get 'em.
Also, I will never forgive you if you don't get atleast a copy, a singular copy, of saya's WoD, her wheel.
Hamiln is also a good support, who gives strength, debuffs and helps you cycle cards, and despite his heavy card costs he basically always refunds himself
He's on the banner.

Also the best way to help yourself is to gain understanding of the game's mechanics and characters and teambuilding, and understanding that getting to endgame takes a time = the magical commonsense I was talking about. If you don't understand the underlying reason of the advice I or Cheri gave you, then you're enjoying the game...but not optimally. Again, this is a great game, so don't get too depressed at the advice
Repeating: don't pull standard ultra. If you're gonna pull ultra then it better be on the limited ones, more specifically on the good limited ones.
